revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23362124453|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mexico%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mexico%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
===State flags===
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the thirty-one [[states of Mexico]] and the Mexican Federal District:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
|-
| [[Template:Country data Aguascalientes]] || {{flag|Aguascalientes}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Baja California]] || {{flag|Baja California}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Baja California Sur]] || {{flag|Baja California Sur}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Campeche]] || {{flag|Campeche}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Chiapas]] || {{flag|Chiapas}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Chihuahua]] || {{flag|Chihuahua}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Coahuila]] || {{flag|Coahuila}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Colima]] || {{flag|Colima}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Durango]] || {{flag|Durango}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Guanajuato]] || {{flag|Guanajuato}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Guerrero]] || {{flag|Guerrero}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Hidalgo]] || {{flag|Hidalgo}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Jalisco]] || {{flag|Jalisco}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data México (state)]] || {{flag country|México (state)}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Michoacán]] || {{flag|Michoacán}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Morelos]] || {{flag|Morelos}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Nayarit]] || {{flag|Nayarit}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Nuevo León]] || {{flag|Nuevo León}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Oaxaca]] || {{flag|Oaxaca}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Puebla]] || {{flag|Puebla}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Querétaro]] || {{flag|Querétaro}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Quintana Roo]] || {{flag|Quintana Roo}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data San Luis Potosí]] || {{flag|San Luis Potosí}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Sinaloa]] || {{flag|Sinaloa}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Sonora]] || {{flag|Sonora}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tabasco]] || {{flag|Tabasco}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tamaulipas]] || {{flag|Tamaulipas}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tlaxcala]] || {{flag|Tlaxcala}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Veracruz]] || {{flag|Veracruz}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Yucatán]] || {{flag|Yucatán}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Zacatecas]] || {{flag|Zacatecas}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Mexican Federal District]] || {{flag|Mexican Federal District}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>
